description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure dressed in casual attire, featuring a pair of fitted jeans and a casual top. The figure is wearing low-top sneakers with visible laces and a slightly worn appearance. The posture is upright and relaxed, with both feet flat on the ground and legs straight. The clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a modern, everyday urban style. The figure's head and upper body are not visible in the provided images, focusing attention on the lower half. The overall appearance is typical of a city dweller or someone walking along a sidewalk or in a park.
description: An adult pedestrian in casual jeans and sneakers, standing upright with a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing both legs, jeans, and sneakers clearly aligned and facing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the left leg and the side of the sneaker.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jeans and the heels of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the right leg and the side of the sneaker.
